findings.title: Deactivated user has active OAuth token evidence
findings.evidenceSummary: [MOCKED DATA] Token relationship detected for an inactive user. Token value and user identity are not stored in this sample.
findings.recommendation: Review the user record and connected application access. Revoke token manually if confirmed as no longer required.

findings.title: Connected application requires owner review
findings.evidenceSummary: [MOCKED DATA] Application exists without a confirmed business owner in the portfolio sample.
findings.recommendation: Confirm business owner, technical owner, access model and whether the application should be marked as paid, free or controlled.

redactionNotice: This sample is fully mocked. It does not contain real org IDs, usernames, emails, Salesforce record IDs, tokens, session identifiers, internal URLs, package licence keys or customer data.
